channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: PAC calls on trans Kansans to flee after law voids opposite-sex driver's license markers
item.description: An LGBTQ group is encouraging transgender residents to leave Kansas "for their safety" as the state implements its first-in-the-nation law invalidatin...

item.title: A Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms Might Be ‘Non-Woke,’ But It’s Not The Conservative Triumph We Need
item.description: While A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms might be 'non-woke,' it's not the explicitly conservative piece of pop culture we need.

item.title: How The West Aided And Abetted The Oct. 7 Attack On Israel
item.description: Is Israel’s response to the Oct. 7 Hamas terrorist attacks disproportionate? Not if you know what really happened.

item.title: Gavin Newsom Wants A ‘More Culturally Normal’ Democrat Party. That’s Impossible
item.description: Start with the fact that if you have to use a phrase like “more culturally normal” in politics, you’re already weird as hell. That’s California Democr...

item.title: Hillary Clinton says she had no relationship with sex traffickers Epstein, Maxwell
item.description: Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton said she told a House panel Thursday that she knows nothing about Jeffrey Epstein's sex trafficking crimes, ...

item.title: Humanizing Elvis
item.description: Baz Luhrmann’s EPiC finds depth in pop iconography.

item.title: Dems Silent After New Revelations About Jack Smith’s Spying Ops On Political Enemies
item.description: 'I hope they put Jack Smith behind bars for this!' said Mark Davis, one of many conservative victims of the special counsel and 'Arctic Frost'

item.title: Three Cheers for Jack
item.description: Why must the sports media try to cancel the joy?

item.title: Yet Another Transgender Shooting Suspect
item.description: The phenomenon of trans violence should not be taboo.

item.title: Anthropic rejects Pentagon's ultimatum over unlimited Claude AI use for military
item.description: Leading artificial intelligence company Anthropic rejected an ultimatum Thursday from the Trump administration to open up its AI applications to unlim...

item.title: The Week: A Supersized State of the Union
Trump Said We ‘Obliterated’ Iran’s Nuclear Program Last June. So Why Are We About To Go War?
item.description: The administration’s justifications for action against Iran keep shifting. Why can’t we get a straight answer?

item.title: The ‘Ins’ and ‘Outs’ of American Politics
item.description: As Willi Schlamm observed decades ago, the main division in politics is between who’s in the in-crowd and who’s not.

item.title: Republican voter ID bill stalls in Senate despite Trump demands
item.description: Election-year legislation to impose strict new proof-of-citizenship requirements on voting appears stalled in the Senate, for now, despite President D...

item.title: Minnesota judge threatens criminal contempt against ICE over failure to follow orders
item.description: The chief federal judge in Minnesota lambasted the Trump administration on Thursday for its continued inability to follow court orders in releasing il...
